name: Ondansetron
description: I-antiemetic ye-receptor engu-5-HT3 ekhethiwe. Isebenza kahle kakhulu ekucanuzeleni nasekuhlanzeni. I-ODT (ithebhulethi ehlukanisayo ngomlomo) iwusizo kuzilungiselelo zenkambu lapho i-IV ingatholakali. Kufakwe kwamanye amaphakethe amaphilisi okulwa.
indications: Isicanucanu nokuhlanza (i-chemotherapy, i-opioid-indused, post-operative, ehlobene ne-TBI)
dose: 4-8 mg IV/IO push slow over 2-5 min. I-ODT: 4-8 mg incibilike ngaphansi kolimi. IM: 4 mg.
contraindications: I-hypersensitivity eyaziwayo ku-ondansetron noma abanye abaphikisi be-5-HT3
I-Congenital long QT syndrome (idosi ephezulu IV kuphela)
warnings: Umthamo ophezulu we-IV ungase unwebe isikhawu se-QT -- sebenzisa umthamo ophansi kakhulu osebenza ngempumelelo IV.
Ayishintshi indlela yomoya esigulini esivalekile ngokuphalaza -- ivikela indlela yokuphefumula kuqala.

pediatric.dose: 0.1-0.15 mg/kg IV (ubukhulu obungu-4 mg). I-ODT: 4mg yezingane> iminyaka emi-4.
pediatric.note: Kusetshenziswa kabanzi futhi kubekezelelwe kahle kwezokwelapha zezingane.

obstetric.note: Idatha enomkhawulo ekukhulelweni. Sebenzisa isicanucanu/ukuhlanza okukhulu ngemva kwekota yokuqala lapho izinzuzo zidlula izingozi. Akunconywa ku-trimester yokuqala.
